welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.body: Hi {username}, welcome aboard. We are glad to have you.

welcomeByAdmin.title: Welcome
welcomeByAdmin.body: Hi {username}, your account has been created by admin. Welcome aboard.

welcomeSocial.title: Welcome
welcomeSocial.body: Hi {username}, welcome aboard. Your account is ready to use.

verificationEmail.title: Email Verification
verificationEmail.body: Hi {username}, please verify your email address to activate your account.

verifiedEmail.title: Email Verified
verifiedEmail.body: Hi {username}, your email address has been verified successfully.

mobileNumberVerified.title: Mobile Number Verified
mobileNumberVerified.body: Hi {username}, your mobile number {mobileNumber} has been verified successfully.

changePassword.title: Password Changed
changePassword.body: Hi {username}, your password has been changed successfully.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.body: Hi {username}, we received a request to reset your password.

publishTermPolicy.title: Term Policy Update
publishTermPolicy.body: A new {type} term policy version {version} has been published. Please review it.

newDeviceLogin.title: New Device Login
newDeviceLogin.body: Hi {username}, there is a new device login from {device} in {city} at {loginAt}.

resetTwoFactorByAdmin.title: Two-Factor Authentication Reset
resetTwoFactorByAdmin.body: Hi {username}, your two-factor authentication has been reset by admin.

temporaryPasswordByAdmin.title: Temporary Password
temporaryPasswordByAdmin.body: Hi {username}, a temporary password has been set. It will expire at {passwordExpiredAt}.

resetPassword.title: Password Reset
resetPassword.body: Hi {username}, your password has been reset successfully.

userAcceptTermPolicy.title: Term Policy Accepted
userAcceptTermPolicy.body: Hi {username}, you have accepted the {type} term policy version {version}.

error.alreadyRead: Notification is already marked as read.
